item.text: I’ll execute the turn from the briefing only, using the provided action/result paths. I’m choosing an engine-first deck line with Village into Smithy, then converting the opening board move toward center control.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
DECK_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-002.deck.json
BOARD_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-002.board.json
DECK_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-002.deck.result.json
BOARD_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-002.board.result.json
WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-002.win-events.json
TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-002.terminal-win-events.json

cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-002\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":3},{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":3},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON

bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"

cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-002\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":9},\"to\":{\"col\":2,\"row\":8}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-002\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":7},\"to\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6}},{\"unit\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":2,\"row\":7}},{\"unit\":\"P2-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":9},\"to\":{\"col\":2,\"row\":8}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
  bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"
fi

SUMMARY="P2 opened with Village into Smithy for engine velocity, then pushed units toward the western center while keeping ranged support behind the advance."
REASONING="Village before Smithy maximizes cards and preserves action tempo. With no attack targets in range and early centers uncontested near P2, the scout takes center-west-south while raider, guardian, and marksman move efficiently toward the middle to contest further centers next turn."

COMMIT_LOG=$(mktemp)
if ! bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win >"$COMMIT_LOG" 2>&1; then
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
  if grep -q "winEvents" "$COMMIT_LOG"; then
    python3 - "$COMMIT_LOG" "$WIN_EVENTS" "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" <<'"'PY'
import json, re, sys
log=open(sys.argv[1]).read()
for label,path in [('winEvents',sys.argv[2]),('terminalWinEvents',sys.argv[3])]:
    m=re.search(label + r\"["'^'"\\[]*(\\[[\\s\\S]*?\\])\", log)
    if m:
        arr=json.loads(m.group(1))
        open(path,'w').write(json.dumps(arr,separators=(',',':'))+'\\n')
PY
    EXTRA=()
    [ -s \""'$WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--win-events "$WIN_EVENTS")
    [ -s "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--terminal-win-events "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS")
    bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win "${EXTRA[@]}"
  else
    exit 1
  fi
else
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
fi
rm -f "$COMMIT_LOG"

bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win "$RUN/timeline.json"

node - <<'"'NODE'
const fs=require('fs');
const deck=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/results/turn-002.deck.result.json','utf8'));
const board=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/results/turn-002.board.result.json','utf8'));
const da=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-002.deck.json','utf8'));
const ba=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-002.board.json','utf8'));
console.log('DECK_LINE', JSON.stringify(da.actions));
console.log('BOARD_LINE', JSON.stringify(ba.actions));
console.log('DECK_RESULT_SUMMARY', JSON.stringify({phase: deck.phase, active: deck.active?.id, supply: deck.supply, gameOver: deck.gameOver, winner: deck.winner}));
console.log('BOARD_RESULT_SUMMARY', JSON.stringify({supplyControl: board.supplyControl, supply: board.supply, gameOver: board.gameOver, winner: board.winner}));
console.log('RATIONALE Village into Smithy maximized early engine velocity; P2 used the scout to claim center-west-south and advanced the rest of the formation toward central contests without wasting tempo on unavailable attacks.');
NODE"

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-002`.

Deck line: Village, Smithy, move to buy, end turn.

Board line: scout claimed `center-west-south` at `(3,7)`; raider advanced to `(4,6)`; guardian moved to `(2,7)` after the first occupied-hex attempt was corrected; marksman moved to `(2,8)`.

Rationale: Village into Smithy maximizes early engine velocity. On board, P2 contests a center immediately while moving the main formation efficiently toward central control, with no useful attacks available this turn.
